title: Pixel Perfect [Let's Do Addon]
description: A pack that remodels some of the Let's Do item models to look more like their sprites.
body:
A pack that remodels some of the Let's Do item models to look more like their sprites.  

As a fan of the Let's Do series, I love that so many items can be placed on the ground as blocks, this is great for decor!  
But, a personal pet peeve of mine is that the block models appear to be stylistically different from their items.
This pack adds some consistency by attempting to give all placeable drinks a model that looks similar to the item sprite.  

This is done entirely by creating new models, without modifying any assets from the original mods, I felt this limitation was important for keeping the feel the same.  

Currently, this pack only changes some models from [Let's Do Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery) but I plan to expand in the future.

[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/garden-gals) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/coolbot100s/projects) [![Planet Minecraft](https://github.com/coolbot100s/Bouncy-Leaves/assets/76798835/0b2c0293-c2ab-4956-9055-70bc7d7141c5)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/collection/146032/all-garden-gals-content/) [![discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/qxRVkGDjdJ) [![generic-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/donate/generic-singular_vector.svg)](https://github.com/sponsors/coolbot100s)
